title: berlandiera humilis
intro: Berlandiera humilis, also known as the desert fogfruit or desert honeysuckle, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Berlandiera humilis include reducing pain and inflammation, treating respiratory problems, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or salves, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
